title: Unique Smoky Egyptian Fromage Blanc Tagine
description: A quick and easy Egyptian dish featuring fromage blanc, with a smoky flavor and a grassy, chewy texture, cooked in a traditional clay tajine vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fromage blanc to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a clay tajine vessel.
Top the fromage blanc mixture with chopped fresh parsley.
Cover the tajine with a lid and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the tajine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
